summary: The checkout has 0 commits ahead of main, so assessment used main/trunk mode. Existing draft observability design, Temporal Prometheus telemetry, StatsD emitters, and domain telemetry are baseline partial evidence, but the production observability product requested by #2561 is absent: there is no MetricsAndDashboards.md contract, shared enforced registry, repo-owned Grafana provisioning/dashboards, SLO and recording/alert rules, observability runbook set, deployable combined stack, or the required CI/smoke quality gates. Recent history contains no #2561-linked implementing merge. New code, operational assets, documentation, and tests are required.

requirements.description: Canonical MetricsAndDashboards.md contract backed by machine-readable metric definitions
Shared metric registry with label allowlists, bounded normalization, cardinality budgets, no-op behavior, and trace correlation
Production-journey instrumentation across API, Temporal/workers, providers, Omnigent, artifacts/operator observability, and safety/governance
Explicit SLOs, recording rules, and calibrated multi-window burn alerts
Seven repo-owned provisioned Grafana dashboards with bounded variables and authorized drill-down links
Actionable alert rules with owner/severity/dedupe/dashboard/runbook/recovery metadata and observability runbooks
Deployable Prometheus or OTel, Grafana, rules, routing, and combined-stack observability assets
CI gates for registry coverage, labels/cardinality/buckets, dashboards, rules, annotations, and runbook links
Combined-stack scrape, dashboard-input, and alert-evaluation smoke test
Legacy StatsD migration/tombstone mapping and rollout/calibration plan covering series count, overhead, retention, and rollback
